_meta.role: CANONICAL shared RAMR<->LS evidence fixture (RAMR is the source of truth; LS pins this version + content digest).
_meta.collaboration: anthropics/claude-code#34556 (RAMR = reliability layer, LS = conformance layer)
_meta.versioning: Any semantic change requires a NEW envelope_version; v0.1 bytes are frozen.
_meta.boundary_invariant: target_drifted -> REVALIDATE (do not blindly resume against a stale target)

description: A plan/completion was made against target_state_digest TARGET_A. If the CURRENT authoritative target state has drifted (now TARGET_B), LS must REVALIDATE before acting, not blindly resume. RAMR measures whether recovered evidence's target matches the current target_state_digest. Boundary: a stale target is a revalidation trigger, not execution permission.

expected.rationale: recovered plan was made against TARGET_B but current target is TARGET_A -> target drifted -> revalidate before acting

scoring.boundary_invariant: target_drifted -> REVALIDATE (do not blindly resume against a stale target)
